name: Chicken Paprikas W/Dumplings Grandpa
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter until tender.
2. Add paprika and blend.
3. Add chicken, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add bouillon, salt, and pepper. Cook until tender. Remove chicken and keep warm.
5. Mix flour and sour cream.
6. Add the mixture to skillet juices, blending over medium heat until thickened without separating.
7. Serve over cooked dumplings.
8. Combine all ingredients for dumplings: mix until smooth. Drop by 1/4 to 1/2 teaspoon into boiling salted water, using a spoon to prevent sticking. Dumplings are done when they rise to the top. Remove with a slotted spoon. Serves 4. "Easy dinner in less than an hour." Our family loves this dish.
